must_do.full_text:
昨天在 X 的英推看到一个很爆火和具有启发性的Codex玩法，中推还没看到有人提。

有人用 Codex 5.5（支持操作电脑的 AI Agent）大幅优化了网络速度，并在帖子里晒出了前后对比。

随后下面这位 @giyu_codes 用户做了件特别聪明的事：

他把整个原帖直接复制粘贴给 Codex，并附上一段自己的提示词：

angles: Codex 5.5操作电脑，网速优化案例火爆海外

must_do.full_text:
Microsoft pulling Claude is the first, but not the last. The issue isn't that the tool isn't useful. 

The issue is that without context and oversight, the tool can spin forever and generates an enormous cost burden that, when cascaded across an entire employee population, makes
must_do.summary: Chamath评论微软下线Claude：成本失控是主因，非工具本身无用。预示更多企业级AI工具将被叫停。
angles: Chamath预警：AI工具成本危机即将爆发
企业级AI的真实困局：有用≠有利可图
从Claude到下一个，AI工具的成本陷阱

must_do.full_text:
I think people don't realize why Gemini Omni is different than other video AIs. It is fully multimodal, so it can edit video natively, too

I took the famous "train " movie from 1896 & made it a bullet train, LEGO, added a time traveler, a centipede, muppets... (see reflections?) https://t.co/WxSO5h9x1Z
must_do.summary: Gemini Omni展示原生视频编辑能力，将1896年电影改编为多元素混搭版本。真正多模态AI的实际应用演示。
angles: Gemini Omni真正多模态：1896电影秒变子弹列车

backup.full_text: For complicated agent work, it's amazing how much GPT5.5 has improved. I found 5.2 to be very far behind Opus. Now using Opus 4.7 after 5.5 feels like a big step backwards. Gotta love this level of competion! Strong comeback for OpenAI.
